title: Enhanced MC
description: Designed to enhance everything while maintaining seamless compatibility with vanilla servers
body:
# ABOUT THIS MODPACK
Relive Minecraft with the Enhanced MC modpack! Designed to enhance everything while maintaining seamless compatibility with vanilla servers, Enhanced MC enriches your Minecraft with new features and improvements. From better UI to enhanced visuals, and biomes with awesome structures, this modpack takes the best of Minecraft and amplifies it without straying from the core essence of the game.
